relationship_label_between_two_people: Which option gives the relationship of person {person_label_a} to person {person_label_b}?
In the pedigree, which option says how {person_label_a} is related to {person_label_b}?
Using the pedigree links, choose the option for {person_label_a}'s relationship to {person_label_b}.
Which option shows the family relationship {person_label_a} has to {person_label_b}?
Read the pedigree chart. Which option is {person_label_a} relative to {person_label_b}?
relatedness_coefficient_between_two_peop: Which option gives the coefficient of relatedness between {person_label_a} and {person_label_b}?
Using the pedigree links, choose the option for the coefficient of relatedness between {person_label_a} and {person_label_b}.
Trace the family connections. Which option is the relatedness coefficient for {person_label_a} and {person_label_b}?
What option shows the correct coefficient of relatedness for {person_label_a} and {person_label_b}?
Read the pedigree chart. Which option is the coefficient of relatedness between {person_label_a} and {person_label_b}?

code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a labeled pedigree chart with family connections and answer options
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the person symbols involved in the family connection
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a string
